name: The Borrowed Standard
specialty: Skilled in navigating and surviving the rifts, offering a unique blend of exploration and combat expertise.

members.name: Vaelis Darrowthorn
members.note: Known for his uncanny ability to predict rift behavior, once a member of the Iron Fang Consortium before betraying them for his own cause

members.name: Thalirion Nightshade
members.note: A rift-born elf, with eyes that glow like embers, rumored to have a deep connection to the rifts themselves

visual: Vaelis, clad in a leather jacket adorned with trinkets from his past adventures, leads the group with a stern gaze. Thalirion, with his ghostly white hair and glowing eyes, follows closely, always scanning the surroundings with a keen focus.
reputation_note: The Borrowed Standard is a name whispered with both fear and admiration. They're known for their ability to navigate the rifts and often seen as a beacon of hope for those lost in the Undercity's chaos
history: [2026-03-15] Completed a standard-tier contract. Rank: Unknown (+1/5)
